Open this page in a new window.

Just like the value of a variable might affect the outcome of a command, a parameter is a value that can be used as input to a program to change the way it behaves. Below we have our usual turtle sim, but with an important added feature, a slider at the top called NUMBER-OF-LAVA.

Change the slider and then click the RESET button. Now do it again. See any differences?

A parameter is simply an input to a program that changes the program’s behavior.

Next turtle activity…
